LEGAL

Terms of Service

Last updated: May 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Trai Inc's website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

2. Services

Trai Inc provides enterprise IT solutions including custom software development, cloud architecture, AI automation, and digital transformation consulting. The scope, deliverables, and timelines for each engagement are defined in individual project agreements.

3. Intellectual Property

All content on this website — including text, graphics, logos, and code — is the property of Trai Inc and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. Client deliverables are transferred upon full payment as specified in individual contracts.

4. Confidentiality

We treat all client information as confidential. Every engagement begins with a mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA). We will not disclose your business information, project details, or proprietary data to any third party without your written consent.

5. Payment Terms

Payment terms, milestones, and schedules are defined in individual project agreements. Unless otherwise specified, invoices are due within 15 business days of receipt. Late payments may incur additional charges.

6. Limitation of Liability

Trai Inc shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services or website. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by the client for the specific service in question.

7. Governing Law

These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh.

8. Contact

For questions regarding these Terms of Service, please reach out at hello@traiinc.com.
